dataHeroHome.title: Heinsohn knows
dataHeroHome.subtitle: A vision <red>|</red> for exceptional results
dataHeroHome.description: We empower the most visionary organizations in the region to go further. With decades of experience and cutting-edge technology, we scale businesses, connect ecosystems, and build the future today.

cardsHeinsohnProfesional.title: Artificial Intelligence
cardsHeinsohnProfesional.description: Artificial Intelligence has become a benchmark for the state of the art in digital transformation. At Heinsohn, we continuously explore new technologies and their strategic application in business, developing AI services that generate real competitive advantages.

cardsIA.title: Machine Learning
cardsIA.description: Predictive algorithms that transform data into actionable insights to optimize business processes.

cardsIA.title: Automation
cardsIA.description: Intelligent automated processes that increase efficiency and reduce operational errors.

cardsIA.title: Advanced Analytics
cardsIA.description: Deep insights from complex data for strategic, scientifically-based decision making.

cardSolucionesHome.title: Solutions
cardSolucionesHome.description:
Complete portfolio of services and solutions designed to drive innovation and

efficiency in your organization.

cardsHome.title: Digital Services
cardsHome.description: Custom software development, digital transformation, web, mobile and cross-platform applications, artificial intelligence and data analytics, cloud architecture, application modernization, and innovative technological solutions for the digital age. We create exceptional digital experiences that drive business growth.
cardsHome.textoFooter:
Digital transformation

Mobile & web apps, enterprise platforms, artificial intelligence, data analytics, consulting, and emerging technologies. Dedicated teams & Staff Augmentation.

cardsHome.title: Financial Sector Solutions
cardsHome.description:
Specialized systems for banking, fintechs, insurers, and non-bank entities seeking to lead the digital transformation of the financial sector.

Our solutions allow for the management of loans, financial obligations, investment funds, and portfolios with total efficiency, security, and regulatory compliance. Robust and scalable technology that drives innovation and optimizes comprehensive financial management.
cardsHome.textoFooter:
Fintech and Financial Management

Software designed for the comprehensive administration of loans, payroll deductions, financial obligations, FICs (Investment Funds), investment portfolios, and risk management. Our platforms allow for process automation, regulatory compliance, and guarantee total traceability in every operation, boosting the efficiency and competitiveness of financial entities in LATAM.

cardsHome.title: Pension Sector Solutions
cardsHome.description: We have specialized software for the comprehensive management of pensions, severance pay, and life annuities. Our platforms guarantee traceability, efficiency, and regulatory compliance, allowing pension funds, insurance companies, and financial entities to optimize operations, reduce costs, and offer a 100% digital experience to their affiliates.
cardsHome.textoFooter:
Pension management & savings

Technological platforms for the administration of mandatory and voluntary pensions, severance pay, and pensioner payroll. Our solutions guarantee accuracy in liquidation, regulatory compliance, and digital self-management, driving sustainability and trust in the region's pension systems.

cardsHome.title: HGS - Talent Management
cardsHome.description: Human Global Solutions (HGS) is our company specialized in comprehensive human talent management. We combine advanced technological platforms with specialized outsourcing services to automate HR processes, from recruitment to payroll, performance evaluations, and talent development. We empower the human capital of the most demanding organizations.
cardsHome.textoFooter:
Human Global Solutions

Company specialized in comprehensive human talent management with advanced technological platforms and specialized outsourcing services. More than 1,000 Latin American companies endorse the quality and reliability of our solutions.

cardsHome.title: Enterprise Solutions
cardsHome.description: Custom enterprise software that optimizes processes, improves productivity, and accelerates your organization's growth. We are leading providers of SAP Business One and SAP Grow, the best enterprise solutions on the market. We develop ERP, CRM systems, and comprehensive management platforms adapted to the specific needs of each industry, from SMEs to large corporations.
cardsHome.textoFooter:
SAP Business One & SAP Grow

Leading providers of the best enterprise solutions on the market - ERP, CRM, Business Intelligence, and comprehensive management

casosExito.title: Success Stories
casosExito.description: Real transformations that have revolutionized entire industries through innovative technological solutions.

cardsCasosExito.title: Banking digital transformation
cardsCasosExito.description: Complete modernization of the technological infrastructure of a leading bank, resulting in a 40% improvement in operational efficiency.

cardsCasosExito.title: Risk management platform
cardsCasosExito.description: Development of an intelligent platform for real-time risk assessment and management for an insurance company.

cardsCasosExito.title: Agro-industrial ERP system
cardsCasosExito.description: Implementation of customized SAP Business One to optimize the supply chain and product traceability.

titleClientes.title: Clients
titleClientes.description: Leading organizations that trust our solutions to transform their operations and reach new levels of excellence.
